channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description: The iPhone 17 lineup now has a "budget" option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple's iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]

item.title: BlipBlox After Dark Review: a Synthesizer for Everybody
item.description: The bubbly plastic BlipBlox After Dark synthesizer is funky, adorable, and a little bit confusing. I love making noises with it anyway.

item.title: RFK Jr. Tells Joe Rogan He’s About to Unleash 14 Banned Peptides
item.description: RFK Jr. plans to reverse a sweeping compounding ban of certain peptides issued by the FDA in late 2023.

item.title: The award-winning LG B5 is named our 'best budget OLED TV of 2026' — and it's 50% off at Best Buy today only
item.description: Our best budget OLED TV of 2026, the LG B5, is on sale at Best Buy with a massive 50% discount, bringing the price of the 48-inch model down to just $649.99.

item.title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
item.description: Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple […]...

item.title: Mastodon now has a button for sharing content from other websites
item.description: Sharing content to Mastodon is getting easier with the addition of a universal "Share to Mastodon" button for the decentralized social media platform. Announced on Monday, the widget allows users to share content on any Mastodon server by connecting your Mastodon account and redirecting you to the server that account is on. The blog post […]

item.title: OpenAI Leadership Defends Deal With Pentagon as Employees Wait in Limbo
item.description: Critics are worried OpenAI's technology will be used for mass surveillance and fully autonomous military strikes.

item.title: Cybercriminals are hiring women for more authentic social engineering scams — and are promising up to $1,000 per call
item.description: Cybercriminal group SLSH recruits women to impersonate IT helpdesks, offering up to $1,000 per call while targeting major companies.

item.title: Iranian Ayatollah Khamenei’s Death Sparks Revolt Among Kalshi Customers
item.description: How Kalshi decided to settle a market tied to Iran’s Supreme Leader prompted anger among traders who felt the rules weren’t clear.

item.title: ‘World of Warcraft’ Just Upgraded Its Best City for the First Time in 20 Years, and Now It’s Perfect
item.description: 20 years after 'The Burning Crusade,' with 'Midnight,' Blizzard makes Silvermoon City shine brighter than ever.

item.title: BYD’s luxury brand says it's just made the world’s longest-range EV, with a monster 644 miles between charging stops
item.description: BYD's luxury brand, Denza, has refreshed its sleek fastback, so it can now manage 644 miles on a single charge

item.title: In a Hotter, Wetter South, Mold Is Emerging as a Public Health Crisis
item.description: In Asheville, North Carolina, a housing crisis is colliding with a poorly understood health threat.

item.title: Alibaba's small, open source Qwen3.5-9B beats OpenAI's gpt-oss-120B and can run on standard laptops
item.description: Despite political turmoil in the U.S. AI sector, in China, the AI advances are continuing apace without a hitch.Earlier today, e-commerce giant Alibaba's Qwen Team of AI researchers, focused primarily on developing and releasing to the world a growing family of powerful and capable Qwen open source language and multimodal AI models, unveiled its newest batch, the Qwen3.5 Small Model Series, which consists of:Qwen3.5-0.8B & 2B: Two models, both ptimized for "tiny" and "fast" performance, intended for prototyping and deployment on edge devices where battery life is paramount.Qwen3.5-4B: A strong...

item.title: Microsoft Bans Term ‘Microslop’ From Official Discord Server
item.description: Stop hurting Satya Nadella's feelings.

item.title: MWC 2026 day 1: the 8 best gadgets we've seen today, from super-slim foldables to high-end wireless earbuds
item.description: It's the biggest mobile tech event of the year, and the TechRadar team is busy checking out everything that's noteworthy.

item.title: Triceratops skeleton ‘Trey’ is up for auction as dinosaur market hits record highs
item.description: Trey has a pre-auction estimate of $4.5 million to $5.5 million. A triceratops skeleton that stood in a Wyoming museum for decades will be auctioned off, a rare instance of a museum-exhibited dinosaur going to the auction block just as the market for the prehistoric giants has hit record highs.

item.title: Starlink's next-gen satellite network could provide 150 Mbps speeds by end of next year
item.description: Starlink is getting ready to launch its second generation of satellites, and it's expected to match the speeds of a traditional terrestrial network. During a keynote at Mobile World Congress, Starlink execs detailed the roadmap for the company's upgrade towards the next generation of satellites called V2. "The goal of Starlink Mobile ... is to provide a terrestrial-like connectivity when you're connected to the satellite system," Michael Nicolls, SpaceX's senior vice president of Starlink engineering, said during the MWC keynote. "In the right conditions, it should look and feel like you're co...

item.title: Never get lost again, as this startup can give you 5G tracking even without GPS - right down to the centimeter
item.description: ZaiNar claims it can turn standard 5G signals into centimeter level positioning without GPS, new hardware, or handset manufacturer cooperation.

item.title: ‘Draft Barron Trump’ website and memes tap into a very real anxiety in the wake of U.S. military action in Iran
item.description: As conflict escalates in the Middle East, Google searches for “military draft” are on the rise. Over the weekend, a new website popped up that opens with a striking manifesto: “America is strong because its leaders are strong. President Trump proves that every day. Naturally, his son Barron is more than ready to defend the country his father so boldly commands.” ...

item.title: Le mystère des « toiles d'araignée » sur Mars est levé, et leur emplacement relance la question de l'habitabilité
item.description: Repérées depuis l’orbite il y a près de 20 ans, ces étranges « toiles d’araignée » martiennes ont longtemps défié les explications. Après 13 années de route, Curiosity les a enfin examinées de près, et ce qu’il a découvert pourrait bouleverser notre vision du passé climatique de la Planète...

item.title: Switching to Anthropic? Claude can now take your memories from ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot
item.description: The app surged in downloads after Trump blacklisted it from the government. Here’s how new users can import old chats from other services. Anthropic has announced a new “memory” tool that allows Claude users to copy over their chats from other AI chatbots, giving those who want to switch over from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot an easy way.

item.title: Ease Your ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Withdrawals With This Adorable Blooper Reel
item.description: The HBO 'Game of Thrones' spin-off also has a physical release with even more extras coming in June.

item.title: Hands-on with the Xiaomi 17 Ultra: three upgrades I love and two things I wish it had
item.description: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra boasts a refined design, an impressive camera with a 1-inch sensor and a variable telephoto zoom, plus a huge battery.

item.title: Prise de conscience écologique croissante | Explosion de la demande pour les téléphones intelligents d’occasion
item.description: En quelques années, le marché des téléphones d’occasion a explosé, porté par des prix bien plus attrayant que ceux des appareils neufs et une prise de conscience écologique croissante qui incite les consommateurs à se tourner vers des solutions plus durables. Malgré des doutes persistants sur la qualité des produits.

item.title: Avis aux gamers fauchés : ce moniteur Full HD de 27″ rafraîchi à 144 Hz coûte moins de 100 €
item.description: Idéal pour la bureautique ou des sessions gaming, l'écran PC MSI PRO MP273W E14A est un modèle particulièrement fluide, mais surtout très peu cher. Actuellement, PC Componentes le propose en effet à 98,18 euros.

item.title: You could be an influencer without even realizing it
item.description: In late February, Puck reported on a strange case: An influencer with more than a million followers was inadvertently promoting products on Instagram. On some of Julia Berolzheimer's posts, a "Shop the look" button hovered in the corner. When followers clicked it, they were fed similar items to what Berolzheimer was wearing. Her job is […]
